title: Soulpiercing
description: Adds a new weapon inspired by the Master Sword from BOTW!
body:
Crafted using 2 Diamonds, 1 Netherite Ingot, 1 Nether Star, and 1 Stick, the Soulpiercer is a new weapon with the same stats, (attack damage, attack speed, durability, and fire-resistance), of a Netherite Sword, but with a _twist_.

When you are at full health while holding the sword, its blade will glow blue, and right-clicking it will shoot out glowing, blue beams that fly straight and deal 10 points, (or 5 hearts), of damage on contact.

The exact recipe can be found in the **Gallery**.
